hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; test -f continue.md || exit 0; git diff --quiet -- continue.md 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet -- continue.md 2>/dev/null || exit 0; last=$(git log -1 --format=%H -- continue.md 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$last" ] || exit 0; n=$(git rev-list --count "$last"..HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "${n:-0}" -gt 0 ] && printf '{"systemMessage":"continue.md may be stale — %s commit(s) since its last update. Consider running /continue-prompt before wrapping."}' "$n"; exit 0
